title: prehistoric park
description: A simple vanilla-ish modpack with the goal of bringing back dinosaurs
body:
Prehistoric Park is a vanilla-style adventure modpack for Minecraft that brings dinosaurs back from extinction.

Explore a world filled with new biomes, discover ancient fossils, and revive prehistoric creatures. With a combination of Biomes O' Plenty and Fossils and Archeology: Revival, the world becomes larger, more diverse, and full of secrets waiting to be uncovered.

Whether you're collecting new woods and plants, excavating fossils for display in your own museum, or building the ultimate Jurassic-style dinosaur park, Prehistoric Park expands exploration while keeping the classic Minecraft feel.

**Disclaimer** you need to allocate atleast 4GB of ram

**Features**

Discover and revive dinosaurs Collect fossils and ancient artifacts Explore many new biomes and landscapes Build museums or your own dinosaur park Vanilla-style gameplay with expanded adventure Performance improvements for smoother gameplay
